title: Peritoma jonesii
taxonomy: Peritoma jonesii is classified within the family Capparaceae. It belongs to the genus Peritoma. The species is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. Peritoma jonesii is also known as the Jones' bush or Jones' caper. It is often found growing in dry, sandy areas and scrublands.
uses: Peritoma jonesii, also known as Desert Honeysuckle, has been traditionally used in folk medicine for various purposes.
